/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/gpushare-server.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/gpushare-server.dir/server/server.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/gpushare-server.dir/server/generated_dispatch.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/gpushare-server.dir/server/generated_all_dispatch.cpp.o" -o gpushare-server  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/cuda/lib: /opt/cuda/lib/libcudart.so /opt/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs/libcuda.so -lpthread -ldl /usr/lib/librt.a -ldl
